message:
test(storage): Complete async StorageHandle test coverage

Add comprehensive async tests for wa-4vx.3.7:
- Basic write/read operations
- Shutdown flush behavior
- WAL mode concurrent reads
- Workflow step log queries
- Gap recording functionality
- Event lifecycle with handled status
- Bounded channel backpressure with small queue
- Per-pane sequence monotonicity
- Agent session upsert and query

Also fixes test tokens to use minimal-length patterns that pass GitHub
secret scanning while still testing the redactor functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
